articles.title: Ethereum's new staking limit is not a risk to decentralization, says Consensys researcher
articles.description: Ethereum’s Pectra upgrade doesn’t pose a threat to decentralization, according to Mallesh Pai, senior research director at blockchain software firm Consensys, describing the update as a cleanup of the behind-the-scenes “busy work” currently handled by validators. During a May 9 Cointelegraph X Space, Pai said a validator’s chances of proposing a block or earning rewards remain tied to how much ETH they hold, adding that larger validators don’t gain any new advantages under the upgrade: “Rewards

articles.title: Unichain First Ethereum L2 to Deploy Flashbots Rollup-Boost TEE
articles.description: Catenaa, Friday, May 09, 2025- Unichain, an Ethereum Layer 2 network developed by Uniswap Labs, has become the first to process transactions using Flashbots’ Rollup-Boost trusted execution environment, a move aimed at scaling throughput and curbing maximal extractable value (MEV) on-chain. articles.title: ETH Surges 20%, Biggest Gain Since 2021 as Pectra Upgrade Helps Restore 'Confidence'
articles.description: Ethereum's ether ETH led the market in early Asia hours as traders reacted favorably to the protocol's recent Pectra upgrade, sending the token up nearly 20%, the biggest gain since 2021, and trading above $2100 according to market data from CoinDesk.The move comes amid a broader crypto market rally that coincided with bitcoin BTC soaring past $100,000 for the first time in three months.
